data: Revise how to answer mock interview questions confidently

message: Let's revise how to talk about your greatest strength in a mock interview.
image_url:
button_text: Continue!

message: See this hint image to refresh your memory. ☝️
image_url:
button_text: Next!

message: Great! Now answer some questions using the hint image.
image_url:
button_text: Start Practice!

Select the correct way to talk about your greatest strength

1.My greatest strength is adaptability because I can adjust quickly to new environments and expectations.
2.I have many strengths but I cannot think of any right now.

Correct answer: 1

Select the correct way to explain a strength with a clear reason

1.I am good at my job and that is my strength.
2.My greatest strength is critical thinking because it helps me make well-informed decisions under pressure.

Correct answer: 2
My greatest strength is empathy because it helps me understand and connect with people around me.
My greatest strength is persistence because it drives me to keep going even when I face challenges.
My greatest strength is creativity because it allows me to find new and better ways to solve problems.
My greatest strength is reliability because people can always count on me to deliver what I promise.
My greatest strength is initiative because it pushes me to take action without waiting to be told.

first_message: That was incredible! Now we're going to practice by answering few questions in English. Can we start?
prompt_id: 4d3f5213-fcc4-40f3-879d-051908377a31
questions: "'1. The interviewer asks what your greatest professional strength is. Share your strength and reason.'

'2. The interviewer asks how your key strength helps you in your work. Share your skill and reason.'

'3. The interviewer asks you to describe the quality that defines your work style. Share your strength and reason.'

'4. The interviewer asks which skill sets you apart from other candidates. Share your greatest strength and reason.'

'5. The interviewer asks how your strength benefits a team environment. Share your skill and reason.'"

sentence_structure: "My greatest strength is [skill] because [reason]."
